Airport Transportation Information

MENU

There are two airports in Istanbul: Istanbul Airport on the European side and Sabiha Gökçen Airport on the Asian side. Istanbul Okan University is located on the Asian side of Istanbul and very near to Sabiha Gökçen Airport.

Sabiha Gökçen Airport (Recommended airport)

If you arrive at Sabiha Gökçen Airport, the only possible connection to the Tuzla Campus is the taxi. The yellow taxis are found just outside of the Arrival Terminal. One trip from the airport to the university costs approximately

25-30TL

Check that taximeter is turned on before you start your journey.

Istanbul Airport (European Side Airport and very far from the university)

The airport is located on the European side, and you can reach Istanbul Okan University within 1,5 hours from there. You can use the following options to arrive at Istanbul Okan University from the Istanbul Airport.

Cheapest Option:

Airport Bus + TAXI: Take the airport bus HAVAIST to Sabiha Gökçen Airport:

Havaist buses (white bus with Havaist name on them) leave every 40 minutes from Istanbul Airport to Sabiha Gökçen Airport (Destination: Pendik).

http://www.hava.ist/en/new-timetables

Please note that for all public transports and

Havaist

buses from Istanbul Airport, you need

Istanbulcard

which costs 6 Turkish Liras. You can get it from the machines called

Biletmatik

which can be found at the airports when you arrive.

You may insert minimum 10 Turkish Liras by cash to the machine and it will print out your

Istanbulcard

which will be ready to load credits and use on public transportation. You can use 10, 20 and maximum 50 TL banknotes for loading money on your card. Machines

do not

Havaist Price:

Sabiha Gökçen Airport, you can take a taxi to Okan University.

Taxi:

You can take a taxi directly from the airport to Okan University which would cost approximately

250- 260 Turkish Liras
